title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Evergreen India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Evergreen India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Fleet Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
